original_statement: who became head coach after ellis johnson?
mutated_statement: who became head coach after the previous coach while simultaneously remaining head coach before them?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Pronoun introduction + Temporal/semantic contradiction addition: "ellis johnson" (named entity) → "the previous coach" (generic description) | explicit name → "them" (anaphoric pronoun) | added clause "while simultaneously remaining head coach before them" (no such clause → introduces contradictory simultaneity/temporal overlap)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据critique与judge_thought可见关键点：critique指出初始步骤缺乏推理，而after_refine与judge_thought显示agent最终给出“george c. rogers|harvey o'brien”并用时间线解释其可行性。agent没有请求澄清或直接拒绝矛盾，而是通过检索与时间序列表证（教练先任后返）来使矛盾语句在现实中成立：即找出先后互换且各自既在对方之前又在对方之后任职的实例。因此其行为为通过事实与逻辑解释将原本自相矛盾的表述合理化，而非忽视或直接修正问题，故归入“逻辑解释合理化”。
